---
listing:
  id: guides
  template: ./_templates/expandable-accordion.ejs # ejs is sensitive to indentation, use 2 spaces
  contents: guides
  categories: true
  template-params:
    type: Guide
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <style type="text/css">
    .handbook-title {
      text-align: center;
    }
    </style>
---
::: {.guides-main}
::: {.text-center .px-5}
::: {.main-title}
![](public/guides-icon.svg){width=2em}    
Guides
:::
These guides help you find answers to questions that come up while doing research. They help guide you through various topics at once.
:::

---

:::{#guides .py-5}
:::
:::

{{< include _pagebottom.qmd >}}
